## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Related issues

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make typecheck` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs (README / CHANGELOG) where relevant
- [ ] Commits contain no AI authorship trailers

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that needs special attention, trade-offs, or follow-ups.
